Portfolio

[AI] Full Stack Development

Click for fullview

This is a sample project that involves creating a text-to-image generation API application using Cloudflare's Workers AI feature. The project utilizes javascript and Cloudflare's open source AI Models.

SAAS Full Stack Development

Sample code from a project for a SAAS company. A custom web application using Vuejs and Python (django) that provides a user-friendly interface and robust backend functionality to meet the client's specific needs.

Wordpress Development

Click for fullview

This is a custom WordPress website using Elementor, a popular page builder plugin. The project includes designing and developing a visually appealing and user-friendly website that meets the client's requirements and showcases their brand effectively.

N8N Workflow Automation

Multi-scenario project for an agency. A sample N8N scenario that sends emails to new leads and customers automatically, so you can follow up with them faster and never miss an opportunity. It utilizes Notion, Gemini AI, and Brevo.

Click for fullview

Make.com Workflow Automation

Click for fullview

This is a sample Make.com scenario that sends discovery call email to clients automatically when the deal is moved. It utilizes Hubspot, Gemini AI, Slack and Gmail.

Initial SEO On-Page Audit

This initial SEO audit was done for a client's website to identify areas for improvement and optimize their online visibility. It utilizes various SEO tools and techniques.

Personal Dashboard

Click for fullview

This project involves implementing a personal dashboard using Astro and JavaScript. It utilizes various frontend technologies to create a responsive and interactive user interface.

Quantitative Finance: Kelly Criterion Calculation

(Self-Studied) This involves implementing the Kelly Criterion for optimal bet sizing in quantitative finance. It utilizes Python for the calculations and data analysis. There are other computations done within the repo.
